creator: stb@lassitu.de
text:
Created attachment 241028
patch to update the port to gitea 1.19.0

Update gitea to 1.19.0

This release fixes two security issues, and contains a large number of changes, some of them breaking. See the release notes for details.

Release notes: https://blog.gitea.io/2023/03/gitea-1.19.0-is-released/
